'''fatala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemindarate|zemindarate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemindarate|zemindarate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fatala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fætælæth|fætælæth]] || [[word:fætælæj|fætælæj]] || [[word:fætælæsh|fætælæsh]] || [[word:fætælæ|fætælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fatatalath|fatatalath]] || [[word:fatatalaj|fatatalaj]] || [[word:fatatalash|fatatalash]] || [[word:fatatala|fatatala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fatalath|fatalath]] || [[word:fatalaj|fatalaj]] || [[word:fatalash|fatalash]] || [[word:fatala|fatala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fataflath|fataflath]] || [[word:fataflaj|fataflaj]] || [[word:fataflash|fataflash]] || [[word:fataflaf|fataflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fatalatha|fatalatha]] || [[word:fatalaja|fatalaja]] || [[word:fatalasha|fatalasha]] || [[word:fatalaka|fatalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fatalath|fatalath]] || [[word:fatalaj|fatalaj]] || [[word:fatalash|fatalash]] || [[word:fatala|fatala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fatalathal|fatalathal]] || [[word:fatalajal|fatalajal]] || [[word:fatalashal|fatalashal]] || [[word:fatalakal|fatalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fatalathatha|fatalathatha]] || [[word:fatalajaja|fatalajaja]] || [[word:fatalashasha|fatalashasha]] || [[word:fatalaka|fatalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fatalathan|fatalathan]] || [[word:fatalajan|fatalajan]] || [[word:fatalashan|fatalashan]] || [[word:fatalakan|fatalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fatalathaoro|fatalathaoro]] || [[word:fatalajaoro|fatalajaoro]] || [[word:fatalashaoro|fatalashaoro]] || [[word:fatalakaoro|fatalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
